name: Gdi Property Group
analysis: GDI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.6300. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.6350, stop A$0.5940, target A$0.7580 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
